params.query: ((text:Schenini OR text:Schenini OR text__reviews:Schenini) OR (text:"Port Breton" OR text:"Port Breton" OR text__reviews:"Port Breton") OR (text:"Porto Bretone" OR text:"Porto Bretone" OR text__reviews:"Porto Bretone")) AND (emigra* OR (text:coloni OR text:coloni OR text__reviews:coloni) OR (text:truffa OR text:truffa OR text__reviews:truffa) OR (text:Oceania OR text:Oceania OR text__reviews:Oceania))
params.qin: (Schenini OR "Port Breton" OR "Porto Bretone") AND (emigra* OR coloni OR truffa OR Oceania)
